name: Remove Exported Mailbox from Exchange Webserver
notes:
Converted from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Christian Burkard (Nextron Systems)
SIGMA Title: Remove Exported Mailbox from Exchange Webserver
SIGMA Description: Detects removal of an exported Exchange mailbox which could be to cover tracks from ProxyShell exploit

False positives:
- Unknown

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event matches devicetype=12 AND (LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%remove-mailboxexportrequest%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '% -identity %' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '% -confirm "false"%') AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY Remove Exported Mailbox from Exchange Webserver on events which are detected by the LOCAL system

AND when the event matches devicetype=12 AND (LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%remove-mailboxexportrequest%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '% -identity %' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '% -confirm "false"%') AQL filter query
RED_list: Event name: Remove Exported Mailbox from Exchange Webserver
